task_completion.description: Create a Daily chart for SPY
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is open in NinjaTrader 8. The tab or chart header clearly displays 'SPY' and 'Daily' or '1 Day', indicating the correct instrument and timeframe.

task_completion.description: Add a Regression Channel indicator overlaid on price
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Regression Channel indicator (typically a center line with upper and lower bands) is overlaid directly on the main price chart. The indicator label in the top-left of the price panel should indicate 'Regression Channel' with parameters '50' and '2'.

task_completion.description: Add an R-Squared indicator in a sub-panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: An R-Squared indicator is visible in a separate sub-panel below the price chart. The indicator label in the top-left of this sub-panel should read 'R-Squared' with the parameter '50'.

task_completion.description: Add a Stochastics indicator in a sub-panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Stochastics indicator is visible in its own separate sub-panel. The indicator label in the top-left of this sub-panel should read 'Stochastics' with parameters '3', '14', and '3' (order may vary depending on NinjaTrader's display, e.g., D, K, Smooth).

The workspace is saved. This can be verified by seeing the agent click 'Save' in the Workspaces menu of the Control Center, or by observing the active workspace name in the bottom right corner of the Control Center without a grey asterisk (*) next to it.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to configure the chart and indicators
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with NinjaTrader's menus, Data Series dialog, and Indicators dialog, rather than editing XML/JSON configuration files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The chart and indicators are genuinely rendered by NinjaTrader 8
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window contains standard NinjaTrader UI elements like crosshairs, axes, legends, and toolbars. The indicators are not manually drawn or pasted as images.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass UI interactions
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using PowerShell, Python, or other scripts to automatically generate the workspace file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: SPY. Timeframe: Daily. Indicators required: 1) Regression Channel (Period: 50, Width: 2) overlaid on price. 2) R-Squared (Period: 50) in a sub-panel. 3) Stochastics (Period K: 14, Period D: 3, Smooth: 3) in a sub-panel. The workspace must be saved via the NinjaTrader Control Center.
